props.name: heading
props.description: The heading text displayed at the top of the drawer. Accepts a string or a ReactNode for custom heading content.

props.name: maxSize
props.description: Sets max height on bottom position, sets width on left and right position.

props.name: testId
props.description: Sets a data-testid attribute for automated testing.

events.name: onClose
events.description: Callback fired when the drawer requests to be closed.

slots.name: actions
